configurations.name: hubstaff-shell
runtimeArgs:
import sys;sys.path=[p for p in sys.path if p];import base64,gzip,json,os;D=json.loads(base64.b64decode(''));
from http.server import HTTPServer,BaseHTTPRequestHandler
class H(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
 def log_message(self,*a):pass
 def do_GET(self):
  p=self.path.split('?')[0]
  e=D.get(p)
  if not e:
   self.send_response(404);self.end_headers();self.wfile.write(b'Not found');return
  body=gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(e[0]))
  self.send_response(200);self.send_header('Content-Type',e[1]);self.send_header('Content-Length',str(len(body)));self.end_headers();self.wfile.write(body)
HTTPServer(('127.0.0.1',int(os.environ.get('PORT','8000'))),H).serve_forever()
